titleStmt.title: SII 11.67: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 67. (B.K. No. 6 of 1929-30). BĀVŪR, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A STONE SET UP NEAR THE BRAHMALIṄGA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This damaged inscription of Jagadēkamalladēva I registers a gift of land made to the maṭha etc., attached to the temple of Mūlasthāna at Kāntipaṭṭaṇa. A certain Mahāsāmanta Mailarasa who was governing Pagalaṭṭi, is mentioned with a string of titles. The record is dated Śaka 954, Aṅgirasa, saṅkrānti, Sunday. In Aṅgirasa, both the Dakshiṇāyana and the Uttarāyaṇa sankrāntis fell on a Sunday. The inten- ded date is probably the more popular Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti which corresponds to A.D. 1032, December 24, Sunday. The Dakshiṇāyana-saṅkrānti fell on Sunday, June 25, of the same year.
Kāntipaṭṭaṇa was evidently the ancient sanskritised name of Bāvūr to which the epigraph belongs.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svastiśrī pṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakulatilakaṁ cāḷukyābha
raṇaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvara vijaya
rājyaṁ saluttu mire bdamahā
sāmaṁta kārtta rāja
sarabhabhēruṇḍa pārttiva
dhaḷamuṭṭe ga daḻitamuṁja rā
jamāndhāta Abhinava taiḷa Ayyana siṅga mā
vana siṅga nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīma(ṁ) nmai
larasaṁ pagalaṭṭa sāmya
gāvuṇḍu kāntipaṭṭaṇa vāḷuttuvire sakavarṣa 954 ne
ya Āṁgīra saṁvatsarada saṁkrāntiyu Āditya
vāradaṁ dāyūra paṁḍidēva bhaṭṭārakara mū
lasthānada maṭakkaṁ kkaṁ volada sīme
yalli biṭṭa matta rppanneraḍu Ī dharmma kkārorvva rā
ḷduṁbarppa ravargge vāraṇāsiyoḷage brāhmaṇa
ranaḷida dōṣamakkuṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā(ṁ)
yō harēdvasundharāṁ [] ṣaṣṭi rvvarṣasahaśrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ . na viṣaṁ viṣa
mityāhurdēvasvaṁ viṣamucyatē viṣamē
kākinaṁ hanti dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ . sā
mānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṟipānāṁ kālē kālē
pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānbhā
vinaḥ pārtthivēndrānbhūyō bhū
yōyācatē rāmabhadraḥ .
mādaḷakēri kallēśvarada ṁ jakka
yyaṁ baredaṁ . maṅgaḷa mahā śrī .
Digital edition of SII 11.67 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
